payload.markdown:
Hãy giúp tôi debug trong scene VRCourseSelection để icon toggle luôn hiển thị ở góc phải dưới.

Yêu cầu thực hiện chính xác:

Mở scene Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity.
Chọn GameObject tên VRCourseSelectionUI.
Kiểm tra component CourseToggleController có tồn tại.
Trong CourseToggleController, gán đúng:
toggleViewTree = CourseToggleButton.uxml
toggleStyle = CourseToggleButton.uss
courseSelectionUI = chính component CourseSelectionUI trên object này
courseSelectionDocument = UIDocument trên object này
courseSelectionRootName = lesson-selection-window-root
startOpened = true
animate = true
Kiểm tra UIDocument trên VRCourseSelectionUI:
sourceAsset phải là CourseSelectionUI UXML (đang dùng hiện tại)
PanelSettings không null.
Vào Play Mode và dùng UI Toolkit Debugger:
Xác nhận có node course-toggle-root và course-toggle-button trong rootVisualElement.
Nếu có nhưng không thấy, set trực tiếp style cho course-toggle-root:
position: absolute
right: 18
bottom: 18
z-index: 9999
display: flex
opacity: 1
Nếu course-toggle-root không tồn tại ở runtime, báo rõ script nào đã clear lại rootVisualElement sau khi CourseToggleController chạy.
Sau khi fix, lưu scene.
Kết quả mong muốn:

Luôn nhìn thấy icon ở góc phải-dưới.
Bấm icon sẽ ẩn/hiện phần course selection, không phá kiến trúc hiện tại.

            toggleController = go.AddComponent<CourseToggleController>();
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(toggleController);
        }

            result.Log("Found CourseToggleController on {0}", go.name);
        }

        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var uiDocument = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();

        // Load Assets
        var toggleViewTree = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseToggleButton.uxml");
        var toggleStyle = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseToggleButton.uss");

        if (toggleViewTree == null) result.LogError("Could not load CourseToggleButton.uxml");
        if (toggleStyle == null) result.LogError("Could not load CourseToggleButton.uss");

        // Gán giá trị theo yêu cầu
        result.RegisterObjectModification(toggleController);

        // [SerializeField] private UIDocument courseSelectionDocument;
        // [SerializeField] private string courseSelectionRootName = "lesson-selection-window-root";
        // [SerializeField] private bool startOpened = true;
        // [SerializeField] private bool animate = true;

        var so = new SerializedObject(toggleController);
        so.FindProperty("toggleViewTree").objectReferenceValue = toggleViewTree;
        so.FindProperty("toggleStyle").objectReferenceValue = toggleStyle;
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionUI").objectReferenceValue = selectionUI;
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionDocument").objectReferenceValue = uiDocument;
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionRootName").stringValue = "lesson-selection-window-root";
        so.FindProperty("startOpened").boolValue = true;
        so.FindProperty("animate").boolValue = true;
        so.ApplyModifiedProperties();

        result.Log("Updated CourseToggleController fields.");

        // Kiểm tra UIDocument
        if (uiDocument != null)
        {
            result.RegisterObjectModification(uiDocument);
            var selectionUXML = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uxml");
            if (uiDocument.visualTreeAsset != selectionUXML)
            {
                uiDocument.visualTreeAsset = selectionUXML;
                result.Log("Updated UIDocument sourceAsset to CourseSelectionUI.uxml");
            }
            if (uiDocument.panelSettings == null)
            {
                result.LogWarning("UIDocument PanelSettings is null.");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogError("UIDocument not found on VRCourseSelectionUI");
        }

        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene);
        result.Log("Scene saved.");
    }
}

using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Collections;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity");
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        
        // We can't easily wait for frames in IRunCommand, but we can register a callback.
        // However, IRunCommand expects a synchronous result or a way to handle async.
        // Actually, we can use EditorApplication.update to check.
        
        int frameCount = 0;
        EditorApplication.CallbackFunction updateCallback = null;
        updateCallback = () =>
        {
            if (!EditorApplication.isPlaying)
            {
                EditorApplication.update -= updateCallback;
                return;
            }

            frameCount++;
            if (frameCount >= 10) // Wait 10 frames to be sure
            {
                EditorApplication.update -= updateCallback;
                CheckUI(result);
                EditorApplication.isPlaying = false;
            }
        };
        
        EditorApplication.update += updateCallback;
        result.Log("Started Play Mode check...");
    }

    private void CheckUI(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found in Play Mode.");
            return;
        }

        var doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            result.LogError("UIDocument or rootVisualElement is null.");
            return;
        }

        var toggleRoot = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        var toggleButton = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-button");
        var lessonSelection = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");

        result.Log("Runtime Check:");
        result.Log("- course-toggle-root: {0}", toggleRoot != null ? "FOUND" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- course-toggle-button: {0}", toggleButton != null ? "FOUND" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- lesson-selection-window-root: {0}", lessonSelection != null ? "FOUND" : "MISSING");

        if (toggleRoot == null)
        {
            // If missing, check why.
            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root is MISSING! Analyzing scripts...");
        }
        else
        {
            result.Log("Styles of course-toggle-root:");
            result.Log("- position: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.position);
            result.Log("- right: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right);
            result.Log("- bottom: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom);
            result.Log("- display: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display);
            result.Log("- opacity: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }
    }
}

        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

            result.LogWarning("CourseToggleController NOT found on {0}. Adding it.", go.name);
            toggleController = go.AddComponent<CourseToggleController>();
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(toggleController);
        }
        else

            result.Log("Found CourseToggleController on {0}", go.name);
        }

        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var uiDocument = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();

        // Load Assets
        var toggleViewTree = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseToggleButton.uxml");
        var toggleStyle = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseToggleButton.uss");

        if (toggleViewTree == null) result.LogError("Could not load CourseToggleButton.uxml");
        if (toggleStyle == null) result.LogError("Could not load CourseToggleButton.uss");

        // Gán giá trị theo yêu cầu
        result.RegisterObjectModification(toggleController);
        
        // Use reflection to set private fields or use public properties if available.
        // CourseToggleController fields:
        // [SerializeField] private VisualTreeAsset toggleViewTree;
        // [SerializeField] private StyleSheet toggleStyle;
        // [SerializeField] private CourseSelectionUI courseSelectionUI;
        // [SerializeField] private UIDocument courseSelectionDocument;
        // [SerializeField] private string courseSelectionRootName = "lesson-selection-window-root";
        // [SerializeField] private bool startOpened = true;
        // [SerializeField] private bool animate = true;

        var so = new SerializedObject(toggleController);
        so.FindProperty("toggleViewTree").objectReferenceValue = toggleViewTree;
        so.FindProperty("toggleStyle").objectReferenceValue = toggleStyle;
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionUI").objectReferenceValue = selectionUI;
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionDocument").objectReferenceValue = uiDocument;
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionRootName").stringValue = "lesson-selection-window-root";
        so.FindProperty("startOpened").boolValue = true;
        so.FindProperty("animate").boolValue = true;
        so.ApplyModifiedProperties();

        result.Log("Updated CourseToggleController fields.");

        // Kiểm tra UIDocument
        if (uiDocument != null)
        {
            result.RegisterObjectModification(uiDocument);
            var selectionUXML = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uxml");
            if (uiDocument.visualTreeAsset != selectionUXML)
            {
                uiDocument.visualTreeAsset = selectionUXML;
                result.Log("Updated UIDocument sourceAsset to CourseSelectionUI.uxml");
            }
            if (uiDocument.panelSettings == null)
            {
                result.LogWarning("UIDocument PanelSettings is null.");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogError("UIDocument not found on VRCourseSelectionUI");
        }

        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene);
        result.Log("Scene saved.");
    }
}

using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Collections;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity");
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        
        // We can't easily wait for frames in IRunCommand, but we can register a callback.
        // However, IRunCommand expects a synchronous result or a way to handle async.
        // Actually, we can use EditorApplication.update to check.
        
        int frameCount = 0;
        EditorApplication.CallbackFunction updateCallback = null;
        updateCallback = () =>
        {
            if (!EditorApplication.isPlaying)
            {
                EditorApplication.update -= updateCallback;
                return;
            }

            frameCount++;
            if (frameCount >= 10) // Wait 10 frames to be sure
            {
                EditorApplication.update -= updateCallback;
                CheckUI(result);
                EditorApplication.isPlaying = false;
            }
        };
        
        EditorApplication.update += updateCallback;
        result.Log("Started Play Mode check...");
    }

    private void CheckUI(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found in Play Mode.");
            return;
        }

        var doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            result.LogError("UIDocument or rootVisualElement is null.");
            return;
        }

        var toggleRoot = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        var toggleButton = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-button");
        var lessonSelection = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");

        result.Log("Runtime Check:");
        result.Log("- course-toggle-root: {0}", toggleRoot != null ? "FOUND" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- course-toggle-button: {0}", toggleButton != null ? "FOUND" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- lesson-selection-window-root: {0}", lessonSelection != null ? "FOUND" : "MISSING");

        if (toggleRoot == null)
        {
            // If missing, check why.
            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root is MISSING! Analyzing scripts...");
        }
        else
        {
            result.Log("Styles of course-toggle-root:");
            result.Log("- position: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.position);
            result.Log("- right: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right);
            result.Log("- bottom: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom);
            result.Log("- display: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display);
            result.Log("- opacity: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }
    }
}

payload.markdown:
Hãy debug tại chỗ để tìm vì sao icon UI Toolkit không render trong Play Mode, dù đã có node trong cây UI.

Yêu cầu:

Mở scene Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity.
Chọn GameObject VRCourseSelectionUI và xác nhận:
Có UIDocument.
Có CourseSelectionUI.
Có CourseToggleController.
Trong Play Mode, mở UI Toolkit Debugger và chọn đúng panel của UIDocument trên VRCourseSelectionUI.
Tìm node course-toggle-root và course-toggle-button.
Chụp lại các giá trị runtime thực tế:
display, visibility, opacity, z-index
resolved width/height
worldBound
hierarchy parent chain tới rootVisualElement
Nếu node có nhưng worldBound bằng 0 hoặc nằm ngoài panel:
Gán runtime trực tiếp cho course-toggle-root:
position absolute
right 18
bottom 18
left auto
top auto
width 64
height 64
z-index 9999
display flex
visibility visible
opacity 1
Gán runtime cho course-toggle-button:
width 56
height 56
display flex
visibility visible
opacity 1
background-color xanh hoặc trắng rõ ràng
text Menu
Kiểm tra PanelSettings của UIDocument:
Target Texture (nếu có) có đúng không.
Sorting Order.
Scale Mode.
Có panel nào khác đè lên không.
Kiểm tra object mesh hiển thị world-space UI:
Mesh/Quad nhận render texture có active không.
Material alpha có bằng 0 không.
Camera có nhìn thấy bề mặt đó không.
Kết luận chính xác nguyên nhân cuối cùng và áp dụng fix trực tiếp trong scene rồi Save Scene.

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "3f1ee639-92f3-46a2-8943-9a5defac682b", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
        
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

        result.Log("GameObject: {0}", go.name);
        result.Log("- UIDocument: {0}", uiDoc != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseSelectionUI: {0}", selectionUI != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseToggleController: {0}", toggleController != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");

        if (uiDoc != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", uiDoc.panelSettings != null ? uiDoc.panelSettings.name : "null");
            if (uiDoc.panelSettings != null)
            {
                var ps = uiDoc.panelSettings;
                result.Log("  - Render Mode: {0}", ps.renderMode);
                result.Log("  - Target Texture: {0}", ps.targetTexture != null ? ps.targetTexture.name : "null");
                result.Log("  - Sorting Order: {0}", ps.sortingOrder);
                result.Log("  - Scale Mode: {0}", ps.scaleMode);
            }
        }
        
        // Check for Canvas or World-Space Mesh if it's VR UI
        var meshRenderer = go.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
        if (meshRenderer != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found MeshRenderer in children: {0} (Active: {1})", meshRenderer.name, meshRenderer.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial != null)
            {
                result.Log("Material: {0}, Shader: {1}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.name, meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.shader.name);
                if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_BaseColor"))
                    result.Log("BaseColor: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_BaseColor"));
                else if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_Color"))
                    result.Log("Color: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_Color"));
            }
        }

        // Check VRPanelAnchorManager
        var anchorManager = go.GetComponent<VRPanelAnchorManager>();
        if (anchorManager != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found VRPanelAnchorManager");
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Inspect Scene Components and PanelSettings"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

payload.markdown:
<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Examining Rendering Issues**

I'm now focusing on the `UISurface` and its active state. It seems to be inactive, which would definitely explain the UI not rendering. I'm also considering the `WorldSpace` mode of the `UIDocument`, which might utilize a unique renderer and visibility setup. This could be key to solving the problem.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Isolating Core Rendering Problems**

The `UISurface` inactive state is definitely a prime suspect. The `WorldSpace` rendering mode hints at needing a `MeshRenderer` on the `GameObject`. I'm also going to check `VRPanelAnchorManager` to see how the UI visibility is handled and confirm that nothing in `CourseSelectionUI` is disabling the `UISurface`. I'm writing a script to check state *after* initialization.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "4c8adc77-6779-41ce-bd39-817e60ee34cf", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Collections;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity");
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        
        // Wait a few frames for initialization
        int framesToWait = 15;
        EditorApplication.CallbackFunction update = null;
        update = () =>
        {
            if (framesToWait > 0)
            {
                framesToWait--;
                return;
            }
            EditorApplication.update -= update;
            InspectAtRuntime(result);
            EditorApplication.isPlaying = false;
        };
        EditorApplication.update += update;
    }

    private void InspectAtRuntime(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null) return;

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (uiDoc == null || uiDoc.rootVisualElement == null) return;

        var root = uiDoc.rootVisualElement;
        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        var toggleButton = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-button");

        result.Log("Runtime Inspection (15 frames after Start):");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-root:");
            result.Log("  - display: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display);
            result.Log("  - visibility: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility);
            result.Log("  - opacity: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.width, toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleRoot.worldBound);
            result.Log("  - pickingMode: {0}", toggleRoot.pickingMode);
            
            // Hierarchy trace
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            result.Log("  - Hierarchy Path: {0}", path);
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root NOT found in rootVisualElement.");
        }

        if (toggleButton != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-button:");
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleButton.resolvedStyle.width, toggleButton.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleButton.worldBound);
        }

        // Check the window root
        var selectionRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (selectionRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("lesson-selection-window-root: display={0}, opacity={1}", selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.display, selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }

        // Surface check
        var surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            result.Log("UISurface GameObject Active: {0}", surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            var meshRenderer = surface.GetComponent<MeshRenderer>();
            if (meshRenderer != null)
            {
                result.Log("UISurface MeshRenderer Enabled: {0}", meshRenderer.enabled);
                if (meshRenderer.material != null)
                {
                    result.Log("UISurface Material: {0}", meshRenderer.material.name);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Runtime Inspection 15 Frames after Start"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Verifying Component Setup**

Now, I've confirmed that the scene components are in place, so the next action I'm undertaking is a deep dive into the `PanelSettings`. I'm going to meticulously check the assigned values, paying close attention to `targetTexture`, `sortingOrder`, and `scaleMode`, to ensure they're configured correctly for our VR environment. Then I will go through the checking of the world-space UI mesh next.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "3f1ee639-92f3-46a2-8943-9a5defac682b", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
        
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

        result.Log("GameObject: {0}", go.name);
        result.Log("- UIDocument: {0}", uiDoc != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseSelectionUI: {0}", selectionUI != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseToggleController: {0}", toggleController != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");

        if (uiDoc != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", uiDoc.panelSettings != null ? uiDoc.panelSettings.name : "null");
            if (uiDoc.panelSettings != null)
            {
                var ps = uiDoc.panelSettings;
                result.Log("  - Render Mode: {0}", ps.renderMode);
                result.Log("  - Target Texture: {0}", ps.targetTexture != null ? ps.targetTexture.name : "null");
                result.Log("  - Sorting Order: {0}", ps.sortingOrder);
                result.Log("  - Scale Mode: {0}", ps.scaleMode);
            }
        }
        
        // Check for Canvas or World-Space Mesh if it's VR UI
        var meshRenderer = go.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
        if (meshRenderer != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found MeshRenderer in children: {0} (Active: {1})", meshRenderer.name, meshRenderer.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial != null)
            {
                result.Log("Material: {0}, Shader: {1}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.name, meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.shader.name);
                if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_BaseColor"))
                    result.Log("BaseColor: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_BaseColor"));
                else if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_Color"))
                    result.Log("Color: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_Color"));
            }
        }

        // Check VRPanelAnchorManager
        var anchorManager = go.GetComponent<VRPanelAnchorManager>();
        if (anchorManager != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found VRPanelAnchorManager");
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Inspect Scene Components and PanelSettings"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Collections;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity");
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        
        // Wait a few frames for initialization
        int framesToWait = 15;
        EditorApplication.CallbackFunction update = null;
        update = () =>
        {
            if (framesToWait > 0)
            {
                framesToWait--;
                return;
            }
            EditorApplication.update -= update;
            InspectAtRuntime(result);
            EditorApplication.isPlaying = false;
        };
        EditorApplication.update += update;
    }

    private void InspectAtRuntime(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null) return;

        var root = uiDoc.rootVisualElement;

            result.Log("  - opacity: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.width, toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleRoot.worldBound);
            result.Log("  - pickingMode: {0}", toggleRoot.pickingMode);
            
            // Hierarchy trace

            while (p != null)
            {

                p = p.parent;

        }
        else

            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root NOT found in rootVisualElement.");
        }

        if (toggleButton != null)

            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleButton.resolvedStyle.width, toggleButton.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleButton.worldBound);
        }

        // Check the window root
        var selectionRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (selectionRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("lesson-selection-window-root: display={0}, opacity={1}", selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.display, selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }

        // Surface check
        var surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)

            result.Log("UISurface GameObject Active: {0}", surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);

            if (meshRenderer != null)

                if (meshRenderer.material != null)

                    result.Log("UISurface Material: {0}", meshRenderer.material.name);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "535ea700-d911-4556-b77d-d8552e8d4a48", "args": {"title": "Inject Runtime UI Debugger", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Linq;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // We will inject a temporary MonoBehavior to log runtime UI state to the console,
        // then we will read the console logs.
        GameObject debugObj = new GameObject("RuntimeUIDebugger");
        debugObj.AddComponent<RuntimeUIDebugger>();
        
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        result.Log("Injected RuntimeUIDebugger and entered Play Mode. Please wait a few seconds...");
    }
}

public class RuntimeUIDebugger : MonoBehaviour
{
    private int frames = 0;
    private void Update()
    {
        frames++;
        if (frames == 30) // Wait 30 frames
        {
            LogUI();
            // EditorApplication.isPlaying = false; // Don't stop yet, let's see if we can get a screenshot or more logs
        }
    }

    private void LogUI()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] UIDocument or rootVisualElement missing.");
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = doc.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] rootVisualElement size: {root.resolvedStyle.width}x{root.resolvedStyle.height}, layout: {root.layout}");

        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] Found course-toggle-root:");
            Debug.Log($"  - Styles: display={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, visibility={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility}, opacity={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Layout: {toggleRoot.layout}, worldBound={toggleRoot.worldBound}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Position: right={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right}, bottom={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom}");
            
            // Parent chain
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.Log($"  - Path: {path}");
            if (p != null) Debug.Log($"  - Parent Layout: {p.layout}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("[RuntimeUIDebugger] course-toggle-root NOT found.");
            // List all children names
            string children = string.Join(", ", root.Children().Select(c => string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.name) ? c.GetType().Name : c.name));
            Debug.Log($"  - Root children: {children}");
        }

        var lessonRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (lessonRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] lesson-selection-window-root: display={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}, layout={lessonRoot.layout}");
        }
        
        // Check PanelSettings
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] PanelSettings: {doc.panelSettings.name}, targetTexture={doc.panelSettings.targetTexture?.name}");
        }
        
        // Check UISurface
        Transform surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] UISurface active={surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy}, scale={surface.localScale}");
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
        
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

        result.Log("GameObject: {0}", go.name);
        result.Log("- UIDocument: {0}", uiDoc != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseSelectionUI: {0}", selectionUI != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseToggleController: {0}", toggleController != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");

        if (uiDoc != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", uiDoc.panelSettings != null ? uiDoc.panelSettings.name : "null");
            if (uiDoc.panelSettings != null)
            {
                var ps = uiDoc.panelSettings;
                result.Log("  - Render Mode: {0}", ps.renderMode);
                result.Log("  - Target Texture: {0}", ps.targetTexture != null ? ps.targetTexture.name : "null");
                result.Log("  - Sorting Order: {0}", ps.sortingOrder);
                result.Log("  - Scale Mode: {0}", ps.scaleMode);
            }
        }
        
        // Check for Canvas or World-Space Mesh if it's VR UI
        var meshRenderer = go.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
        if (meshRenderer != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found MeshRenderer in children: {0} (Active: {1})", meshRenderer.name, meshRenderer.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial != null)
            {
                result.Log("Material: {0}, Shader: {1}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.name, meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.shader.name);
                if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_BaseColor"))
                    result.Log("BaseColor: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_BaseColor"));
                else if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_Color"))
                    result.Log("Color: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_Color"));
            }
        }

        // Check VRPanelAnchorManager
        var anchorManager = go.GetComponent<VRPanelAnchorManager>();
        if (anchorManager != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found VRPanelAnchorManager");
        }
    }
}

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "4c8adc77-6779-41ce-bd39-817e60ee34cf", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Collections;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity");
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        
        // Wait a few frames for initialization
        int framesToWait = 15;
        EditorApplication.CallbackFunction update = null;
        update = () =>
        {
            if (framesToWait > 0)
            {
                framesToWait--;
                return;
            }
            EditorApplication.update -= update;
            InspectAtRuntime(result);
            EditorApplication.isPlaying = false;
        };
        EditorApplication.update += update;
    }

    private void InspectAtRuntime(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null) return;

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (uiDoc == null || uiDoc.rootVisualElement == null) return;

        var root = uiDoc.rootVisualElement;
        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        var toggleButton = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-button");

        result.Log("Runtime Inspection (15 frames after Start):");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-root:");
            result.Log("  - display: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display);
            result.Log("  - visibility: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility);
            result.Log("  - opacity: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.width, toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleRoot.worldBound);
            result.Log("  - pickingMode: {0}", toggleRoot.pickingMode);
            
            // Hierarchy trace
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            result.Log("  - Hierarchy Path: {0}", path);
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root NOT found in rootVisualElement.");
        }

        if (toggleButton != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-button:");
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleButton.resolvedStyle.width, toggleButton.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleButton.worldBound);
        }

        // Check the window root
        var selectionRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (selectionRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("lesson-selection-window-root: display={0}, opacity={1}", selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.display, selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }

        // Surface check
        var surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            result.Log("UISurface GameObject Active: {0}", surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            var meshRenderer = surface.GetComponent<MeshRenderer>();
            if (meshRenderer != null)
            {
                result.Log("UISurface MeshRenderer Enabled: {0}", meshRenderer.enabled);
                if (meshRenderer.material != null)
                {
                    result.Log("UISurface Material: {0}", meshRenderer.material.name);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Linq;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // We will inject a temporary MonoBehavior to log runtime UI state to the console,
        // then we will read the console logs.
        GameObject debugObj = new GameObject("RuntimeUIDebugger");
        debugObj.AddComponent<RuntimeUIDebugger>();
        
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        result.Log("Injected RuntimeUIDebugger and entered Play Mode. Please wait a few seconds...");
    }
}

public class RuntimeUIDebugger : MonoBehaviour
{
    private int frames = 0;
    private void Update()
    {
        frames++;
        if (frames == 30) // Wait 30 frames
        {
            LogUI();
            // EditorApplication.isPlaying = false; // Don't stop yet, let's see if we can get a screenshot or more logs
        }
    }

    private void LogUI()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] UIDocument or rootVisualElement missing.");
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = doc.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] rootVisualElement size: {root.resolvedStyle.width}x{root.resolvedStyle.height}, layout: {root.layout}");

        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] Found course-toggle-root:");
            Debug.Log($"  - Styles: display={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, visibility={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility}, opacity={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Layout: {toggleRoot.layout}, worldBound={toggleRoot.worldBound}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Position: right={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right}, bottom={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom}");
            
            // Parent chain
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.Log($"  - Path: {path}");
            if (p != null) Debug.Log($"  - Parent Layout: {p.layout}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("[RuntimeUIDebugger] course-toggle-root NOT found.");
            // List all children names
            string children = string.Join(", ", root.Children().Select(c => string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.name) ? c.GetType().Name : c.name));
            Debug.Log($"  - Root children: {children}");
        }

        var lessonRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (lessonRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] lesson-selection-window-root: display={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}, layout={lessonRoot.layout}");
        }
        
        // Check PanelSettings
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] PanelSettings: {doc.panelSettings.name}, targetTexture={doc.panelSettings.targetTexture?.name}");
        }
        
        // Check UISurface
        Transform surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] UISurface active={surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy}, scale={surface.localScale}");
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "3f1ee639-92f3-46a2-8943-9a5defac682b", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
        
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

        result.Log("GameObject: {0}", go.name);
        result.Log("- UIDocument: {0}", uiDoc != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseSelectionUI: {0}", selectionUI != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseToggleController: {0}", toggleController != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");

        if (uiDoc != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", uiDoc.panelSettings != null ? uiDoc.panelSettings.name : "null");
            if (uiDoc.panelSettings != null)
            {
                var ps = uiDoc.panelSettings;
                result.Log("  - Render Mode: {0}", ps.renderMode);
                result.Log("  - Target Texture: {0}", ps.targetTexture != null ? ps.targetTexture.name : "null");
                result.Log("  - Sorting Order: {0}", ps.sortingOrder);
                result.Log("  - Scale Mode: {0}", ps.scaleMode);
            }
        }
        
        // Check for Canvas or World-Space Mesh if it's VR UI
        var meshRenderer = go.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
        if (meshRenderer != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found MeshRenderer in children: {0} (Active: {1})", meshRenderer.name, meshRenderer.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial != null)
            {
                result.Log("Material: {0}, Shader: {1}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.name, meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.shader.name);
                if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_BaseColor"))
                    result.Log("BaseColor: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_BaseColor"));
                else if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_Color"))
                    result.Log("Color: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_Color"));
            }
        }

        // Check VRPanelAnchorManager

            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleButton.worldBound);
        }

        // Check the window root
        var selectionRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (selectionRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("lesson-selection-window-root: display={0}, opacity={1}", selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.display, selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "3f1ee639-92f3-46a2-8943-9a5defac682b", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
        
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

        result.Log("GameObject: {0}", go.name);
        result.Log("- UIDocument: {0}", uiDoc != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseSelectionUI: {0}", selectionUI != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseToggleController: {0}", toggleController != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");

        if (uiDoc != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", uiDoc.panelSettings != null ? uiDoc.panelSettings.name : "null");
            if (uiDoc.panelSettings != null)
            {
                var ps = uiDoc.panelSettings;
                result.Log("  - Render Mode: {0}", ps.renderMode);
                result.Log("  - Target Texture: {0}", ps.targetTexture != null ? ps.targetTexture.name : "null");
                result.Log("  - Sorting Order: {0}", ps.sortingOrder);
                result.Log("  - Scale Mode: {0}", ps.scaleMode);
            }
        }
        
        // Check for Canvas or World-Space Mesh if it's VR UI
        var meshRenderer = go.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
        if (meshRenderer != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found MeshRenderer in children: {0} (Active: {1})", meshRenderer.name, meshRenderer.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial != null)
            {
                result.Log("Material: {0}, Shader: {1}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.name, meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.shader.name);
                if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_BaseColor"))
                    result.Log("BaseColor: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_BaseColor"));
                else if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_Color"))
                    result.Log("Color: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_Color"));
            }
        }

        // Check VRPanelAnchorManager
        var anchorManager = go.GetComponent<VRPanelAnchorManager>();
        if (anchorManager != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found VRPanelAnchorManager");
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Inspect Scene Components and PanelSettings"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;

        }
        else

            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root NOT found in rootVisualElement.");
        }

        if (toggleButton != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-button:");
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleButton.resolvedStyle.width, toggleButton.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleButton.worldBound);
        }

        // Check the window root
        var selectionRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (selectionRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("lesson-selection-window-root: display={0}, opacity={1}", selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.display, selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }

        // Surface check

        // then we will read the console logs.
        GameObject debugObj = new GameObject("RuntimeUIDebugger");
        debugObj.AddComponent<RuntimeUIDebugger>();
        
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        result.Log("Injected RuntimeUIDebugger and entered Play Mode. Please wait a few seconds...");
    }
}

{
    private int frames = 0;

    {
        frames++;
        if (frames == 30) // Wait 30 frames
        {
            LogUI();
            // EditorApplication.isPlaying = false; // Don't stop yet, let's see if we can get a screenshot or more logs
        }
    }

            return;

        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)

            Debug.Log($"  - Position: right={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right}, bottom={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom}");
            
            // Parent chain
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.Log($"  - Path: {path}");
            if (p != null) Debug.Log($"  - Parent Layout: {p.layout}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("[RuntimeUIDebugger] course-toggle-root NOT found.");
            // List all children names
            string children = string.Join(", ", root.Children().Select(c => string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.name) ? c.GetType().Name : c.name));
            Debug.Log($"  - Root children: {children}");
        }

        var lessonRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (lessonRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] lesson-selection-window-root: display={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}, layout={lessonRoot.layout}");
        }
        
        // Check PanelSettings
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] PanelSettings: {doc.panelSettings.name}, targetTexture={doc.panelSettings.targetTexture?.name}");
        }

using UnityEngine.UIElements;

public class RuntimeUIDebugger : MonoBehaviour

    private int frames = 0;

    {
        frames++;
        if (frames == 60) // Wait 60 frames (1 second at 60fps)
        {
            LogUI();
        }
    }

    private void LogUI()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] UIDocument or rootVisualElement missing.");
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = doc.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] rootVisualElement size: {root.resolvedStyle.width}x{root.resolvedStyle.height}, layout: {root.layout}");

        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] Found course-toggle-root:");
            Debug.Log($"  - Styles: display={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, visibility={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility}, opacity={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Layout: {toggleRoot.layout}, worldBound={toggleRoot.worldBound}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Position: right={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right}, bottom={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom}, pos={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.position}");
            
            // Hierarchy trace
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.Log($"  - Path: {path}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("[RuntimeUIDebugger] course-toggle-root NOT found.");
            string children = string.Join(", ", root.Children().Select(c => string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.name) ? c.GetType().Name : c.name));
            Debug.Log($"  - Root children: {children}");
        }

        var lessonRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (lessonRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] lesson-selection-window-root: display={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}, layout={lessonRoot.layout}");
        }
        
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] PanelSettings: {doc.panelSettings.name}, targetTexture={doc.panelSettings.targetTexture?.name}");
        }
        
        Transform surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] UISurface active={surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy}, scale={surface.localScale}");
        }
    }
}

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Verifying Component Setup**

Now, I've confirmed that the scene components are in place, so the next action I'm undertaking is a deep dive into the `PanelSettings`. I'm going to meticulously check the assigned values, paying close attention to `targetTexture`, `sortingOrder`, and `scaleMode`, to ensure they're configured correctly for our VR environment. Then I will go through the checking of the world-space UI mesh next.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "3f1ee639-92f3-46a2-8943-9a5defac682b", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
        
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

        result.Log("GameObject: {0}", go.name);
        result.Log("- UIDocument: {0}", uiDoc != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseSelectionUI: {0}", selectionUI != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseToggleController: {0}", toggleController != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");

        if (uiDoc != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", uiDoc.panelSettings != null ? uiDoc.panelSettings.name : "null");
            if (uiDoc.panelSettings != null)
            {
                var ps = uiDoc.panelSettings;
                result.Log("  - Render Mode: {0}", ps.renderMode);
                result.Log("  - Target Texture: {0}", ps.targetTexture != null ? ps.targetTexture.name : "null");
                result.Log("  - Sorting Order: {0}", ps.sortingOrder);
                result.Log("  - Scale Mode: {0}", ps.scaleMode);
            }
        }
        
        // Check for Canvas or World-Space Mesh if it's VR UI
        var meshRenderer = go.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
        if (meshRenderer != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found MeshRenderer in children: {0} (Active: {1})", meshRenderer.name, meshRenderer.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial != null)
            {
                result.Log("Material: {0}, Shader: {1}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.name, meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.shader.name);
                if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_BaseColor"))
                    result.Log("BaseColor: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_BaseColor"));
                else if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_Color"))
                    result.Log("Color: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_Color"));
            }
        }

        // Check VRPanelAnchorManager
        var anchorManager = go.GetComponent<VRPanelAnchorManager>();
        if (anchorManager != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found VRPanelAnchorManager");
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Inspect Scene Components and PanelSettings"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "4c8adc77-6779-41ce-bd39-817e60ee34cf", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Collections;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity");
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        
        // Wait a few frames for initialization
        int framesToWait = 15;
        EditorApplication.CallbackFunction update = null;
        update = () =>
        {
            if (framesToWait > 0)
            {
                framesToWait--;
                return;
            }
            EditorApplication.update -= update;
            InspectAtRuntime(result);
            EditorApplication.isPlaying = false;
        };
        EditorApplication.update += update;
    }

    private void InspectAtRuntime(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null) return;

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (uiDoc == null || uiDoc.rootVisualElement == null) return;

        var root = uiDoc.rootVisualElement;
        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        var toggleButton = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-button");

        result.Log("Runtime Inspection (15 frames after Start):");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-root:");
            result.Log("  - display: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display);
            result.Log("  - visibility: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility);
            result.Log("  - opacity: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.width, toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleRoot.worldBound);
            result.Log("  - pickingMode: {0}", toggleRoot.pickingMode);
            
            // Hierarchy trace
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            result.Log("  - Hierarchy Path: {0}", path);
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root NOT found in rootVisualElement.");
        }

        if (toggleButton != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-button:");
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleButton.resolvedStyle.width, toggleButton.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleButton.worldBound);
        }

        // Check the window root
        var selectionRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (selectionRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("lesson-selection-window-root: display={0}, opacity={1}", selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.display, selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }

        // Surface check
        var surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            result.Log("UISurface GameObject Active: {0}", surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            var meshRenderer = surface.GetComponent<MeshRenderer>();
            if (meshRenderer != null)
            {
                result.Log("UISurface MeshRenderer Enabled: {0}", meshRenderer.enabled);
                if (meshRenderer.material != null)
                {
                    result.Log("UISurface Material: {0}", meshRenderer.material.name);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand

}

public class RuntimeUIDebugger : MonoBehaviour
{
    private int frames = 0;
    private void Update()
    {
        frames++;
        if (frames == 30) // Wait 30 frames
        {
            LogUI();
            // EditorApplication.isPlaying = false; // Don't stop yet, let's see if we can get a screenshot or more logs
        }
    }

    private void LogUI()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] UIDocument or rootVisualElement missing.");
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = doc.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] rootVisualElement size: {root.resolvedStyle.width}x{root.resolvedStyle.height}, layout: {root.layout}");

        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] Found course-toggle-root:");
            Debug.Log($"  - Styles: display={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, visibility={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility}, opacity={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Layout: {toggleRoot.layout}, worldBound={toggleRoot.worldBound}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Position: right={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right}, bottom={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom}");
            
            // Parent chain
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.Log($"  - Path: {path}");
            if (p != null) Debug.Log($"  - Parent Layout: {p.layout}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("[RuntimeUIDebugger] course-toggle-root NOT found.");
            // List all children names
            string children = string.Join(", ", root.Children().Select(c => string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.name) ? c.GetType().Name : c.name));
            Debug.Log($"  - Root children: {children}");
        }

        var lessonRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (lessonRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] lesson-selection-window-root: display={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}, layout={lessonRoot.layout}");
        }
        
        // Check PanelSettings
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] PanelSettings: {doc.panelSettings.name}, targetTexture={doc.panelSettings.targetTexture?.name}");
        }
        
        // Check UISurface
        Transform surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] UISurface active={surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy}, scale={surface.localScale}");
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

    {
        // CourseSelectionUI builds in Start() and clears root; wait so toggle is injected after that.
        yield return null;
        yield return null;

        ResolveCourseTarget();
        BuildToggleUi();
        ApplyImmediateState(isOpen);
        UpdateToggleVisualState();
        ensureUiRoutine = null;
    }

    private void BuildToggleUi()
    {
        if (toggleDocument == null)
        {
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = toggleDocument.rootVisualElement;

        if (toggleStyle != null && !root.styleSheets.Contains(toggleStyle))
        {
            root.styleSheets.Add(toggleStyle);
        }

        if (toggleViewTree == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[CourseToggleController] Missing toggleViewTree.");
            return;
        }

        if (root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root") == null)
        {
            toggleViewTree.CloneTree(root);
        }

        toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        toggleButton = root.Q<Button>("course-toggle-button");
        if (toggleButton == null)
        {
            CreateRuntimeFallbackToggle(root);
            toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
            toggleButton = root.Q<Button>("course-toggle-button");
            if (toggleButton == null)
            {
                Debug.LogError("[CourseToggleController] Toggle button not found.");
                return;
            }
        }

        EnforceBottomRightPlacement();

        toggleButton.clicked -= OnToggleClicked;
        toggleButton.clicked += OnToggleClicked;
    }

    private void EnforceBottomRightPlacement()
    {
        if (toggleRoot == null)
        {
            return;
        }

        toggleRoot.style.position = Position.Absolute;
        toggleRoot.style.right = 18f;
        toggleRoot.style.bottom = 18f;
        toggleRoot.style.left = StyleKeyword.Auto;
        toggleRoot.style.top = StyleKeyword.Auto;
        toggleRoot.style.display = DisplayStyle.Flex;
        toggleRoot.style.opacity = 1f;
        toggleRoot.BringToFront();
    }", "filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/CourseToggleController.cs", "description": "Add logging to CourseToggleController and ensure it's on top.", "newString": "    private IEnumerator InitializeAfterUiReady()

        Debug.Log("[CourseToggleController] Initializing UI...");
        ResolveCourseTarget();
        BuildToggleUi();
        ApplyImmediateState(isOpen);
        UpdateToggleVisualState();
        ensureUiRoutine = null;
    }

    private void BuildToggleUi()
    {
        if (toggleDocument == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[CourseToggleController] toggleDocument is null.");
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = toggleDocument.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.Log($"[CourseToggleController] Root size: {root.resolvedStyle.width}x{root.resolvedStyle.height}");

        if (toggleStyle != null && !root.styleSheets.Contains(toggleStyle))
        {
            root.styleSheets.Add(toggleStyle);
        }

        if (toggleViewTree == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[CourseToggleController] Missing toggleViewTree.");
            return;
        }

        toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggleRoot == null)
        {
            Debug.Log("[CourseToggleController] Cloning toggle tree...");
            toggleViewTree.CloneTree(root);
            toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        }

        toggleButton = root.Q<Button>("course-toggle-button");
        if (toggleButton == null)
        {
            Debug.Log("[CourseToggleController] Falling back to runtime toggle...");
            CreateRuntimeFallbackToggle(root);
            toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
            toggleButton = root.Q<Button>("course-toggle-button");
        }

        EnforceBottomRightPlacement();

        if (toggleButton != null)
        {
            toggleButton.clicked -= OnToggleClicked;
            toggleButton.clicked += OnToggleClicked;
        }
    }

    private void EnforceBottomRightPlacement()
    {
        if (toggleRoot == null) return;

        toggleRoot.style.position = Position.Absolute;
        toggleRoot.style.right = 18f;
        toggleRoot.style.bottom = 18f;
        toggleRoot.style.left = StyleKeyword.Auto;
        toggleRoot.style.top = StyleKeyword.Auto;
        toggleRoot.style.width = 64f;
        toggleRoot.style.height = 64f;
        toggleRoot.style.display = DisplayStyle.Flex;
        toggleRoot.style.opacity = 1f;
        toggleRoot.style.visibility = Visibility.Visible;
        toggleRoot.BringToFront();
        
        Debug.Log($"[CourseToggleController] Enforced placement: {toggleRoot.layout}, worldBound={toggleRoot.worldBound}");
    }"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

    private void InspectAtRuntime(ExecutionResult result)

        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");

            result.Log("  - opacity: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.width, toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleRoot.worldBound);
            result.Log("  - pickingMode: {0}", toggleRoot.pickingMode);
            
            // Hierarchy trace
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            result.Log("  - Hierarchy Path: {0}", path);
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root NOT found in rootVisualElement.");
        }

        if (toggleButton != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-button:");
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleButton.resolvedStyle.width, toggleButton.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleButton.worldBound);
        }

        // Check the window root
        var selectionRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (selectionRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("lesson-selection-window-root: display={0}, opacity={1}", selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.display, selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }

        // Surface check
        var surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            result.Log("UISurface GameObject Active: {0}", surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            var meshRenderer = surface.GetComponent<MeshRenderer>();

                if (meshRenderer.material != null)
                {
                    result.Log("UISurface Material: {0}", meshRenderer.material.name);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // We will inject a temporary MonoBehavior to log runtime UI state to the console,
        // then we will read the console logs.
        GameObject debugObj = new GameObject("RuntimeUIDebugger");
        debugObj.AddComponent<RuntimeUIDebugger>();
        
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        result.Log("Injected RuntimeUIDebugger and entered Play Mode. Please wait a few seconds...");
    }
}

public class RuntimeUIDebugger : MonoBehaviour
{
    private int frames = 0;
    private void Update()
    {
        frames++;
        if (frames == 30) // Wait 30 frames
        {
            LogUI();
            // EditorApplication.isPlaying = false; // Don't stop yet, let's see if we can get a screenshot or more logs
        }
    }

    private void LogUI()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] UIDocument or rootVisualElement missing.");
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = doc.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] rootVisualElement size: {root.resolvedStyle.width}x{root.resolvedStyle.height}, layout: {root.layout}");

        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] Found course-toggle-root:");
            Debug.Log($"  - Styles: display={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, visibility={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility}, opacity={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Layout: {toggleRoot.layout}, worldBound={toggleRoot.worldBound}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Position: right={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right}, bottom={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom}");
            
            // Parent chain
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.Log($"  - Path: {path}");
            if (p != null) Debug.Log($"  - Parent Layout: {p.layout}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("[RuntimeUIDebugger] course-toggle-root NOT found.");
            // List all children names
            string children = string.Join(", ", root.Children().Select(c => string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.name) ? c.GetType().Name : c.name));
            Debug.Log($"  - Root children: {children}");
        }

        var lessonRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (lessonRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] lesson-selection-window-root: display={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}, layout={lessonRoot.layout}");
        }
        
        // Check PanelSettings
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] PanelSettings: {doc.panelSettings.name}, targetTexture={doc.panelSettings.targetTexture?.name}");
        }
        
        // Check UISurface
        Transform surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] UISurface active={surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy}, scale={surface.localScale}");
        }
    }
}

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.SaveFile", "call_id": "d16ddc2b-a5ba-4484-93c5-d8fcaa64942f", "args": {"filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/RuntimeUiInspector.cs", "fileContent": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;

[InitializeOnLoad]
public static class RuntimeUiInspector
{
    static RuntimeUiInspector()
    {
        EditorApplication.update += Update;
    }

    private static float nextLogTime = 0f;
    private static void Update()
    {
        if (!EditorApplication.isPlaying) return;
        if (Time.unscaledTime < nextLogTime) return;
        nextLogTime = Time.unscaledTime + 2f;

        Inspect();
    }

    public static void Inspect()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null) return;

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null) return;

        VisualElement root = doc.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.LogWarning($"[RuntimeUIInspector] Root: {root.layout}, class={string.Join(",", root.GetClasses())}");

        var toggle = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggle != null)
        {
            Debug.LogWarning($"[RuntimeUIInspector] Toggle: {toggle.layout}, worldBound={toggle.worldBound}, display={toggle.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={toggle.resolvedStyle.opacity}, zIndex=N/A, pos={toggle.resolvedStyle.position}");
            
            // Hierarchy Trace
            string trace = toggle.name;
            VisualElement p = toggle.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                trace = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + "(" + string.Join(",", p.GetClasses()) + ") > " + trace;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.LogWarning($"[RuntimeUIInspector] Trace: {trace}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIInspector] Toggle NOT found.");
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>
