using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
        
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

        result.Log("GameObject: {0}", go.name);
        result.Log("- UIDocument: {0}", uiDoc != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseSelectionUI: {0}", selectionUI != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseToggleController: {0}", toggleController != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");

        if (uiDoc != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", uiDoc.panelSettings != null ? uiDoc.panelSettings.name : "null");
            if (uiDoc.panelSettings != null)
            {
                var ps = uiDoc.panelSettings;
                result.Log("  - Render Mode: {0}", ps.renderMode);
                result.Log("  - Target Texture: {0}", ps.targetTexture != null ? ps.targetTexture.name : "null");
                result.Log("  - Sorting Order: {0}", ps.sortingOrder);
                result.Log("  - Scale Mode: {0}", ps.scaleMode);
            }
        }
        
        // Check for Canvas or World-Space Mesh if it's VR UI
        var meshRenderer = go.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
        if (meshRenderer != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found MeshRenderer in children: {0} (Active: {1})", meshRenderer.name, meshRenderer.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial != null)
            {
                result.Log("Material: {0}, Shader: {1}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.name, meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.shader.name);
                if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_BaseColor"))
                    result.Log("BaseColor: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_BaseColor"));
                else if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_Color"))
                    result.Log("Color: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_Color"));
            }
        }

        // Check VRPanelAnchorManager
        var anchorManager = go.GetComponent<VRPanelAnchorManager>();
        if (anchorManager != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found VRPanelAnchorManager");
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Inspect Scene Components and PanelSettings"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

    }
}

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "535ea700-d911-4556-b77d-d8552e8d4a48", "args": {"title": "Inject Runtime UI Debugger", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Linq;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // We will inject a temporary MonoBehavior to log runtime UI state to the console,
        // then we will read the console logs.
        GameObject debugObj = new GameObject("RuntimeUIDebugger");
        debugObj.AddComponent<RuntimeUIDebugger>();
        
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        result.Log("Injected RuntimeUIDebugger and entered Play Mode. Please wait a few seconds...");
    }
}

public class RuntimeUIDebugger : MonoBehaviour
{
    private int frames = 0;
    private void Update()
    {
        frames++;
        if (frames == 30) // Wait 30 frames
        {
            LogUI();
            // EditorApplication.isPlaying = false; // Don't stop yet, let's see if we can get a screenshot or more logs
        }
    }

    private void LogUI()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] UIDocument or rootVisualElement missing.");
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = doc.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] rootVisualElement size: {root.resolvedStyle.width}x{root.resolvedStyle.height}, layout: {root.layout}");

        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] Found course-toggle-root:");
            Debug.Log($"  - Styles: display={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, visibility={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility}, opacity={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Layout: {toggleRoot.layout}, worldBound={toggleRoot.worldBound}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Position: right={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right}, bottom={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom}");
            
            // Parent chain
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.Log($"  - Path: {path}");
            if (p != null) Debug.Log($"  - Parent Layout: {p.layout}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("[RuntimeUIDebugger] course-toggle-root NOT found.");
            // List all children names
            string children = string.Join(", ", root.Children().Select(c => string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.name) ? c.GetType().Name : c.name));
            Debug.Log($"  - Root children: {children}");
        }

        var lessonRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (lessonRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] lesson-selection-window-root: display={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}, layout={lessonRoot.layout}");
        }
        
        // Check PanelSettings
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] PanelSettings: {doc.panelSettings.name}, targetTexture={doc.panelSettings.targetTexture?.name}");
        }
        
        // Check UISurface
        Transform surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] UISurface active={surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy}, scale={surface.localScale}");
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

    private void BuildToggleUi()
    {
        if (toggleDocument == null)
        {
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = toggleDocument.rootVisualElement;

        if (toggleStyle != null && !root.styleSheets.Contains(toggleStyle))
        {
            root.styleSheets.Add(toggleStyle);
        }

        if (toggleViewTree == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[CourseToggleController] Missing toggleViewTree.");
            return;
        }

        if (root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root") == null)
        {
            toggleViewTree.CloneTree(root);
        }

        toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        toggleButton = root.Q<Button>("course-toggle-button");
        if (toggleButton == null)
        {
            CreateRuntimeFallbackToggle(root);
            toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");

                Debug.LogError("[CourseToggleController] Toggle button not found.");

            }
        }

        EnforceBottomRightPlacement();

        toggleButton.clicked -= OnToggleClicked;
        toggleButton.clicked += OnToggleClicked;
    }

[InitializeOnLoad]
public static class RuntimeUiInspector
{
    static RuntimeUiInspector()
    {
        EditorApplication.update += Update;
    }

    private static float nextLogTime = 0f;
    private static void Update()

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "f5e91615-7657-4519-b558-9888391fd1a3", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity");
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null) return;

        // 1. Enable UISurface
        Transform surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            if (!surface.gameObject.activeSelf)
            {
                result.RegisterObjectModification(surface.gameObject);
                surface.gameObject.SetActive(true);
                result.Log("Enabled UISurface GameObject.");
            }
        }

        // 2. Ensure CourseToggleController has all assets
        var toggle = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();
        var so = new SerializedObject(toggle);
        
        var toggleViewTree = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseToggleButton.uxml");
        var toggleStyle = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseToggleButton.uss");
        
        so.FindProperty("toggleViewTree").objectReferenceValue = toggleViewTree;
        so.FindProperty("toggleStyle").objectReferenceValue = toggleStyle;
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionUI").objectReferenceValue = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionDocument").objectReferenceValue = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        so.FindProperty("startOpened").boolValue = true;
        so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
        
        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene);
        result.Log("Scene saved with UISurface active and CourseToggleController configured.");
    }
}
", "title": "Fix Scene: Enable UISurface and Configure Toggle Controller"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

I've just opened the `VRCourseSelection` scene and confirmed the existence of the `UIDocument` and relevant UI components like `CourseSelectionUI`. I'm going to meticulously check the assigned values, paying close attention to `targetTexture`, `sortingOrder`, and `scaleMode`, to ensure they're configured correctly for our VR environment. using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);
        
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        var selectionUI = go.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        var toggleController = go.GetComponent<CourseToggleController>();

        result.Log("GameObject: {0}", go.name);
        result.Log("- UIDocument: {0}", uiDoc != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseSelectionUI: {0}", selectionUI != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");
        result.Log("- CourseToggleController: {0}", toggleController != null ? "Present" : "MISSING");

        if (uiDoc != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", uiDoc.panelSettings != null ? uiDoc.panelSettings.name : "null");
            if (uiDoc.panelSettings != null)
            {
                var ps = uiDoc.panelSettings;
                result.Log("  - Render Mode: {0}", ps.renderMode);
                result.Log("  - Target Texture: {0}", ps.targetTexture != null ? ps.targetTexture.name : "null");
                result.Log("  - Sorting Order: {0}", ps.sortingOrder);
                result.Log("  - Scale Mode: {0}", ps.scaleMode);
            }
        }
        
        // Check for Canvas or World-Space Mesh if it's VR UI
        var meshRenderer = go.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>(true);
        if (meshRenderer != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found MeshRenderer in children: {0} (Active: {1})", meshRenderer.name, meshRenderer.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial != null)
            {
                result.Log("Material: {0}, Shader: {1}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.name, meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.shader.name);
                if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_BaseColor"))
                    result.Log("BaseColor: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_BaseColor"));
                else if (meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.HasProperty("_Color"))
                    result.Log("Color: {0}", meshRenderer.sharedMaterial.GetColor("_Color"));
            }
        }

        // Check VRPanelAnchorManager
        var anchorManager = go.GetComponent<VRPanelAnchorManager>();
        if (anchorManager != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found VRPanelAnchorManager");
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Inspect Scene Components and PanelSettings"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "4c8adc77-6779-41ce-bd39-817e60ee34cf", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Collections;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity");
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        
        // Wait a few frames for initialization
        int framesToWait = 15;
        EditorApplication.CallbackFunction update = null;
        update = () =>
        {
            if (framesToWait > 0)
            {
                framesToWait--;
                return;
            }
            EditorApplication.update -= update;
            InspectAtRuntime(result);
            EditorApplication.isPlaying = false;
        };
        EditorApplication.update += update;
    }

    private void InspectAtRuntime(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null) return;

        var uiDoc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (uiDoc == null || uiDoc.rootVisualElement == null) return;

        var root = uiDoc.rootVisualElement;
        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        var toggleButton = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-button");

        result.Log("Runtime Inspection (15 frames after Start):");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-root:");
            result.Log("  - display: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display);
            result.Log("  - visibility: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility);
            result.Log("  - opacity: {0}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.width, toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleRoot.worldBound);
            result.Log("  - pickingMode: {0}", toggleRoot.pickingMode);
            
            // Hierarchy trace
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            result.Log("  - Hierarchy Path: {0}", path);
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("course-toggle-root NOT found in rootVisualElement.");
        }

        if (toggleButton != null)
        {
            result.Log("Found course-toggle-button:");
            result.Log("  - width: {0}, height: {1}", toggleButton.resolvedStyle.width, toggleButton.resolvedStyle.height);
            result.Log("  - worldBound: {0}", toggleButton.worldBound);
        }

        // Check the window root
        var selectionRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (selectionRoot != null)
        {
            result.Log("lesson-selection-window-root: display={0}, opacity={1}", selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.display, selectionRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity);
        }

        // Surface check
        var surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            result.Log("UISurface GameObject Active: {0}", surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy);
            var meshRenderer = surface.GetComponent<MeshRenderer>();
            if (meshRenderer != null)
            {
                result.Log("UISurface MeshRenderer Enabled: {0}", meshRenderer.enabled);
                if (meshRenderer.material != null)
                {
                    result.Log("UISurface Material: {0}", meshRenderer.material.name);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "535ea700-d911-4556-b77d-d8552e8d4a48", "args": {"title": "Inject Runtime UI Debugger", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;
using System.Linq;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // We will inject a temporary MonoBehavior to log runtime UI state to the console,
        // then we will read the console logs.
        GameObject debugObj = new GameObject("RuntimeUIDebugger");
        debugObj.AddComponent<RuntimeUIDebugger>();
        
        EditorApplication.isPlaying = true;
        result.Log("Injected RuntimeUIDebugger and entered Play Mode. Please wait a few seconds...");
    }
}

public class RuntimeUIDebugger : MonoBehaviour
{
    private int frames = 0;
    private void Update()
    {
        frames++;
        if (frames == 30) // Wait 30 frames
        {
            LogUI();
            // EditorApplication.isPlaying = false; // Don't stop yet, let's see if we can get a screenshot or more logs
        }
    }

    private void LogUI()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] VRCourseSelectionUI not found.");
            return;
        }

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null || doc.rootVisualElement == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[RuntimeUIDebugger] UIDocument or rootVisualElement missing.");
            return;
        }

        VisualElement root = doc.rootVisualElement;
        Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] rootVisualElement size: {root.resolvedStyle.width}x{root.resolvedStyle.height}, layout: {root.layout}");

        var toggleRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("course-toggle-root");
        if (toggleRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] Found course-toggle-root:");
            Debug.Log($"  - Styles: display={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, visibility={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.visibility}, opacity={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Layout: {toggleRoot.layout}, worldBound={toggleRoot.worldBound}");
            Debug.Log($"  - Position: right={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.right}, bottom={toggleRoot.resolvedStyle.bottom}");
            
            // Parent chain
            string path = toggleRoot.name;
            VisualElement p = toggleRoot.parent;
            while (p != null)
            {
                path = (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.name) ? p.GetType().Name : p.name) + " > " + path;
                p = p.parent;
            }
            Debug.Log($"  - Path: {path}");
            if (p != null) Debug.Log($"  - Parent Layout: {p.layout}");
        }
        else
        {
            Debug.LogWarning("[RuntimeUIDebugger] course-toggle-root NOT found.");
            // List all children names
            string children = string.Join(", ", root.Children().Select(c => string.IsNullOrEmpty(c.name) ? c.GetType().Name : c.name));
            Debug.Log($"  - Root children: {children}");
        }

        var lessonRoot = root.Q<VisualElement>("lesson-selection-window-root");
        if (lessonRoot != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] lesson-selection-window-root: display={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.display}, opacity={lessonRoot.resolvedStyle.opacity}, layout={lessonRoot.layout}");
        }
        
        // Check PanelSettings
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] PanelSettings: {doc.panelSettings.name}, targetTexture={doc.panelSettings.targetTexture?.name}");
        }
        
        // Check UISurface
        Transform surface = go.transform.Find("UISurface");
        if (surface != null)
        {
            Debug.Log($"[RuntimeUIDebugger] UISurface active={surface.gameObject.activeInHierarchy}, scale={surface.localScale}");
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

    {
        if (toggleDocument == null)
        {
            return;

        VisualElement root = toggleDocument.rootVisualElement;

        if (toggleViewTree == null)
        {
            Debug.LogError("[CourseToggleController] Missing toggleViewTree.");

        {
            toggleViewTree.CloneTree(root);
        }

        toggleButton.clicked -= OnToggleClicked;

    }

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.SaveFile", "call_id": "d16ddc2b-a5ba-4484-93c5-d8fcaa64942f", "args": {"filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/RuntimeUiInspector.cs", "fileContent": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;

[InitializeOnLoad]
public static class RuntimeUiInspector
{
    static RuntimeUiInspector()
    {
        EditorApplication.update += Update;
    }

    private static float nextLogTime = 0f;
    private static void Update()
    {
        if (!EditorApplication.isPlaying) return;
        if (Time.unscaledTime < nextLogTime) return;
        nextLogTime = Time.unscaledTime + 2f;

        Inspect();
    }

    public static void Inspect()
    {
        GameObject go = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (go == null) return;

        UIDocument doc = go.GetComponent<UIDocument>();

    }
}

data.message: Cloud->Relay:  {"$type":"CHAT_RESPONSE_V1","message_id":"8d78a706-fd3d-44d3-a114-04b9f5bbf657","last_message":false,"markdown":"<THOUGHT>{\"content\": \"**Analyzing the UI Issue**\\n\\nI've pinpointed the UI issue: ...

payload.markdown:
<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Analyzing the UI Issue**

I've pinpointed the UI issue: the `UISurface` component within `VRCourseSelectionUI` was deactivated. This prevented the `VRPanelAnchorManager` from activating the entire UI, rendering it invisible, and thus the icon too. The core problem, now, is figuring out *why* it was disabled in the first place, and what is intended behavior.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

data.message: Cloud->Relay:  {"$type":"CHAT_RESPONSE_V1","message_id":"8d78a706-fd3d-44d3-a114-04b9f5bbf657","last_message":false,"markdown":"<THOUGHT>{\"content\": \"**Finalizing the Resolution**\\n\\nThe root cause: the `UISurf...

payload.markdown:
<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Finalizing the Resolution**

The root cause: the `UISurface` component was deactivated, which disabled the entire UI. This prevented the icon from appearing. The `CourseToggleController` was also missing necessary asset assignments for the toggles. I've re-assigned the assets and implemented more aggressive UI updates to ensure the icon's visibility, solving the problem.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

linux.display: curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

win32.display: curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.cmd -o install.cmd && install.cmd && del install.cmd

args: curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.cmd -o install.cmd && install.cmd && del install.cmd

postInstall.message: To use Claude Code, you need to add an API key. Follow these steps: - Create one by visiting Anthropic's settings - Paste your API key below and hit enter to start using the agent

providers.startupTroubleshootingHint: Ensure OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable is set in the <link=open-gateway-preferences><color=#7BAEFA>Gateway preferences</color></link>.

postInstall.message: To use Codex, you need to add an API key. Follow these steps: - Create one by visiting OpenAI's settings - Paste your API key below and hit enter to start using the agent

providers.startupTroubleshootingHint: Ensure GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable is set in the <link=open-gateway-preferences><color=#7BAEFA>Gateway preferences</color></link>.

postInstall.message: To use Gemini, you need to add an API key. Follow these steps: - Create one by visiting Google AI Studio - Paste your API key below and hit enter to start using the agent

providers.helpText: Requires to be logged in to Cursor.
providers.startupTroubleshootingHint: Ensure you are logged into Cursor.

darwin.display: curl https://cursor.com/install -fsS | bash && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc

args: curl https://cursor.com/install -fsS | bash && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc

linux.display: curl https://cursor.com/install -fsS | bash && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc

args: curl https://cursor.com/install -fsS | bash && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc

win32.display: irm 'https://cursor.com/install?win32=true' | iex

postInstall.message: You now need to login to Cursor. Click "Proceed" to open the login flow.
